title: Faster Quality
description: Faster game and better quality at the same time!
body:
# ![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7fffad33b2bd82f0e1f608498d8b6084c54cb1c6_0.webp)
![https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?color=158000&label=downloads&prefix=+%20&query=downloads&url=https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/tOiueKIa&logo=modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?color=158000&label=downloads&prefix=+%20&query=downloads&url=https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/tOiueKIa&logo=modrinth)

Faster Quality is a modpack that boosts your performance, <ins>improves your visual and quality a lot, and add quality of life improvements to make your game playable and more enjoyable while trying not to reduce your performance!</ins>
<details>
<summary>Features</summary>
  
- **Capes**: Allows you to use/see capes from other mods, **[You can also get a free cape!](https://github.com/Tminec/faster-quality-modpack/wiki/Free-Cape)**
  
- **OptiFine Texture Pack Support**: Most of the OptiFine texture packs will work on this modpack too.
- **A huge performance boost**: This modpack boosts your fps a much thanks to the optimization mods such as Sodium.
- **Cleaner Debug Menu**: This modpack removes the uselles stuff in the debug menu.
- **Faster Loading Screens**: This modpack reduces the time of the loading screens in the game.
- **Compatibility**: You can use this modpack in any server you want, anti-cheats won't detect it as a cheat.
- **Reduced Lag**: This modpack reduces the lag in game a lot such as; Chests, paintings, mobs, items.. (etc.)
- **Visual Improvements**: This modpack has a lot of visual imrpovements such as; shaders, connected textures, smooth scrolling, player heads in the chat, extra chat history, first person animations in third person.. (etc.)
- **Quality of Life Imrpovements**: This modpack has quality of life improvements such as; Remember LAN Port, Dynamic lights, ToolTip fix, Zoom feature, Enchantment Icons.. (etc.)
</details>

<details>
<summary>Other modpacks made by me</summary>

- **[Faster Performance](https://modrinth.com/modpack/faster-performance)**: This is a modpack that aims to find the best performance and fix mods to achieve the maximum fps and improving your gameplay without reducing your performance. It also has the best options for the best performance.

- **[Bedrock Edition: Renew](https://modrinth.com/modpack/bedrock-edition-modpack)**: This modpack makes java bedrock, even the menus, features and more! Its also so much customizable!

**See all 17 projects at [the NetherTeam website](https://netherteam.pages.dev/).**
</details>


<details>
<summary>I recommend you to add/remove this...</summary>

 Submit an issue at [the NetherTeam Issue Tracker](https://netherteam.pages.dev/issue-tracker) and I will be sure to reply as fast as possible!

</details>
